note: This file is intentionally minimal. Auth is NOT configured here — auth.selectedType and credentials live in the owner's GLOBAL ~/.qwen/settings.json (pre-provisioned, resolves in any session); this per-workspace seed must NOT set or duplicate them. context.fileName=QWEN.md is verified against qwen-cli-reference.md §11. NO skills.paths field is set: the qwen CLI reference (§9/§11) documents a ~/.qwen/skills/ directory but does NOT document a settings.json skills-wiring field; the p3-3 qwen pilot must confirm how qwen discovers .agents/skills/ and add the correct field here if one exists. Do not add unverified configuration.
